PDPSyncOptimizer.enabled.title: Enable PDP Sync Optimizer
PDPSyncOptimizer.enabled.description: When enabled, skips the cacheable items API call on PDP pages if preloaded data is available in SC.ENVIRONMENT

PDPSyncOptimizer.debug.title: Debug Mode
PDPSyncOptimizer.debug.description: Logs sync skip decisions to the browser console for troubleshooting
